description: task-gopher — SessionStart injects the full Haiku-delegation directive on startup, resume, clear, and post-compaction (so it survives compaction); UserPromptSubmit injects a compact reminder each turn; PreToolUse (strict mode only) blocks the first direct retrieval of each turn once as a consider-task-gopher checkpoint. All are no-ops unless the plugin is toggled ON (and, for the checkpoint, strict mode too).
